title: Item Collectors
description: Adds blocks that collect nearby items
body:
# Item Collectors by JellkaGamez
Ever needed to collect a lot of items fast?
Use the Item Collectors to collect everything nearby.
Just place the block and right click!

## What you can do
You can now pickup items in a radius with the item collectors.
There are 4 teirs of item collectors

- **Wooden**: 10 blocks
- **Stone**: 20 blocks
- **Iron**: 30 blocks
- **Diamond**: 40 blocks

## How you can get it in survival!
You can craft each teir with the respective materials with a hopper in the center.

Here's an example of how you can craft the wooden item collector

![Crafting recipe for the wooden item collector](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec47009257b9f2cdd7157b8131dfa377baf78e0d.png)

## Why would you want this?
This mod makes it super easy to make farms.
- If you have mods such as [Right Click Harvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/rightclickharvest) it makes it super easy to automatically collect drops
- If you are playing a challenge like skyblock, you can collect items that have fell in the void.
